# @infi/pulse-sdk — Complete SDK Reference

> TypeScript SDK for the Pulse Payment Platform. Create payment links,
> process crypto payments (USDC/USDT on Solana) and PIX payments,
> verify webhooks, and embed checkout widgets.
> Zero runtime dependencies.

## Installation

```bash
npm install @infi/pulse-sdk
```

## Quick Start

```typescript
import { Pulse } from '@infi/pulse-sdk'

// Initialize with API key
const pulse = new Pulse('sk_live_...')

// Create a payment link
const link = await pulse.paymentLinks.create({
  title: 'Web Development',
  amount: '150.00',
  currency: 'USD',
  description: 'Landing page development',
})

// Verify webhook signatures (static, no instance needed)
const isValid = Pulse.webhooks.verifySignature(rawBody, signature, secret)

// Embed checkout widget (browser only)
const checkout = Pulse.checkout.mount('#container', { linkId: link.id })
```

---

## Pulse Class

The main entry point. Create an instance with your API key to access resources.

```typescript
class Pulse {
  // Instance resources
  readonly paymentLinks: PaymentLinksResource
  readonly webhooks: WebhooksResource

  // Static utilities (no instance needed)
  static webhooks: { verifySignature: typeof verifyWebhookSignature }
  static checkout: { mount: typeof mountCheckout }

  constructor(config: string | PulseConfig)
}
```

**Constructor:**
- `new Pulse('sk_live_...')` — string shorthand
- `new Pulse({ apiKey: 'sk_live_...', baseUrl: 'https://api.beinfi.com' })` — config object
- Throws `PulseError` if the API key doesn't start with `"sk_live_"`

---

## Configuration

```typescript
interface PulseConfig {
  /** API key starting with `sk_live_`. */
  apiKey: string
  /** Override the API base URL. Defaults to `https://api.beinfi.com`. */
  baseUrl?: string
}
```

---

## Payment Links

Access via `pulse.paymentLinks`.

### create(params)

Create a new payment link.

```typescript
const link = await pulse.paymentLinks.create({
  title: 'Web Development',       // required
  amount: '150.00',                // required, decimal string
  currency: 'USD',                 // optional, 'USD' | 'BRL', default 'USD'
  description: 'Landing page dev', // optional
})
```

**Parameters:**

```typescript
interface CreatePaymentLinkParams {
  title: string           // Human-readable title shown to the payer
  amount: string          // Decimal amount as string (e.g. "99.90")
  description?: string    // Optional description on checkout page
  currency?: 'USD' | 'BRL' // Defaults to "USD"
}
```

**Returns:** `Promise<PaymentLink>`

### list(params?)

List payment links with pagination.

```typescript
const links = await pulse.paymentLinks.list({ limit: 10, offset: 0 })
```

**Parameters:**

```typescript
interface ListPaymentLinksParams {
  limit?: number   // Max results, default 20
  offset?: number  // Skip N results, default 0
}
```

**Returns:** `Promise<PaymentLink[]>`

### get(linkId)

Get a single payment link by ID.

```typescript
const link = await pulse.paymentLinks.get('uuid-here')
```

**Returns:** `Promise<PaymentLink>`
**Throws:** `PulseApiError` with status 404 if not found.

### listIntents(linkId)

List payment intents (payment attempts) for a link.

```typescript
const intents = await pulse.paymentLinks.listIntents('uuid-here')
const confirmed = intents.filter(i => i.status === 'confirmed')
```

**Returns:** `Promise<PaymentIntent[]>`

### PaymentLink Type

```typescript
interface PaymentLink {
  id: string              // UUID
  title: string
  description: string | null
  amount: string          // Decimal string (e.g. "100.00")
  currency: string        // "USD" or "BRL"
  status: string          // "active" or "inactive"
  slug: string            // URL-friendly slug
  userId: string          // UUID
  createdAt: string       // ISO 8601
  updatedAt: string       // ISO 8601
}
```

### PaymentIntent Type

```typescript
interface PaymentIntent {
  id: string
  paymentLinkId: string
  amount: string
  currency: string
  status: string          // "pending" | "observed" | "confirmed" | "failed" | "expired"
  method: string | null   // "crypto" | "pix" | null
  txHash: string | null   // Blockchain tx hash
  confirmedAt: string | null
  createdAt: string
  updatedAt: string
}
```

---

## Webhooks

Access via `pulse.webhooks`.

### create(params)

Create a webhook subscription. **The `secret` is only returned once — store it securely.**

```typescript
const wh = await pulse.webhooks.create({
  url: 'https://example.com/webhook',
  events: ['payment.confirmed'],
})
console.log(wh.secret) // 64-char hex — save this!
```

**Parameters:**

```typescript
interface CreateWebhookParams {
  url: string      // HTTPS URL for webhook POST requests
  events: string[] // Event types (e.g. ["payment.confirmed"])
}
```

**Returns:** `Promise<WebhookCreated>` (includes `secret`)

### list()

List all webhook subscriptions.

```typescript
const webhooks = await pulse.webhooks.list()
```

**Returns:** `Promise<Webhook[]>`

### delete(id)

Delete a webhook subscription.

```typescript
await pulse.webhooks.delete('webhook-uuid')
```

**Returns:** `Promise<void>`

### Webhook Types

```typescript
interface Webhook {
  id: string
  url: string
  events: string[]
  isActive: boolean
  createdAt: string
}

interface WebhookCreated extends Webhook {
  secret: string  // 64-char hex, only returned at creation
}
```

---

## Webhook Verification

Verify that webhook requests came from Pulse using HMAC-SHA256.

### Pulse.webhooks.verifySignature(rawBody, signatureHeader, secret)

```typescript
// Static method — no Pulse instance needed
const isValid = Pulse.webhooks.verifySignature(
  rawBody,                              // raw request body string
  req.headers['x-pulse-signature'],     // "sha256=..." header
  process.env.PULSE_WEBHOOK_SECRET!,    // your webhook secret
)
```

Or as a standalone import:

```typescript
import { verifyWebhookSignature } from '@infi/pulse-sdk'
const isValid = verifyWebhookSignature(rawBody, signatureHeader, secret)
```

**Signature format:** `sha256={hmac_hex}`
**Header:** `X-Pulse-Signature`
**Algorithm:** HMAC-SHA256 with timing-safe comparison

### Express Example

```typescript
app.post('/webhook', express.raw({ type: 'application/json' }), (req, res) => {
  const isValid = Pulse.webhooks.verifySignature(
    req.body.toString(),
    req.headers['x-pulse-signature'] as string,
    process.env.PULSE_WEBHOOK_SECRET!,
  )
  if (!isValid) return res.status(401).send('Invalid signature')

  const payload: WebhookPayload = JSON.parse(req.body.toString())
  console.log('Payment confirmed:', payload.paymentIntentId)
  res.sendStatus(200)
})
```

### Next.js App Router Example

```typescript
// app/api/webhook/route.ts
export async function POST(request: Request) {
  const rawBody = await request.text()
  const signature = request.headers.get('x-pulse-signature')!

  const isValid = Pulse.webhooks.verifySignature(
    rawBody, signature, process.env.PULSE_WEBHOOK_SECRET!,
  )
  if (!isValid) return new Response('Invalid signature', { status: 401 })

  const payload: WebhookPayload = JSON.parse(rawBody)
  // process payment...
  return new Response('OK', { status: 200 })
}
```

### WebhookPayload Type

```typescript
interface WebhookPayload {
  paymentIntentId: string
  amount: string
  currency: string
  method: string       // "crypto" | "pix"
  confirmedAt: string  // ISO 8601
  txHash?: string      // present for crypto payments
}
```

---

## Checkout Widget

Mount an iframe-based checkout widget. Browser-only.

### Pulse.checkout.mount(selector, options)

```typescript
const checkout = Pulse.checkout.mount('#checkout-container', {
  linkId: 'payment-link-id',
  theme: {
    background: '#0f0f23',
    foreground: '#ffffff',
    accent: '#6366f1',
  },
  onReady: () => console.log('Checkout loaded'),
  onSuccess: (payment) => {
    console.log('Paid!', payment.paymentIntentId)
    checkout.unmount()
  },
  onError: (err) => console.error('Error:', err.message),
})

// Event listener alternative
checkout.on('success', (payment) => {
  window.location.href = '/thank-you'
})

// Clean up
checkout.unmount()
```

Or as a standalone import:

```typescript
import { mountCheckout } from '@infi/pulse-sdk'
const instance = mountCheckout('#checkout', { linkId: 'abc-123' })
```

### React Example

```tsx
import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import { Pulse } from '@infi/pulse-sdk'

function Checkout({ linkId }: { linkId: string }) {
  const ref = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!ref.current) return
    const instance = Pulse.checkout.mount(ref.current, {
      linkId,
      onSuccess: (payment) => console.log('Paid!', payment),
    })
    return () => instance.unmount()
  }, [linkId])

  return <div ref={ref} />
}
```

### Checkout Types

```typescript
interface CheckoutMountOptions {
  linkId: string
  baseUrl?: string              // default: "https://pulse.beinfi.com"
  theme?: CheckoutTheme
  onReady?: () => void
  onSuccess?: (payment: CheckoutPayment) => void
  onError?: (error: CheckoutError) => void
  onClose?: () => void
}

interface CheckoutTheme {
  background?: string
  foreground?: string
  card?: string
  accent?: string
  accentForeground?: string
}

interface CheckoutPayment {
  paymentIntentId: string
  amount: string
  currency: string
  method: string
  txHash?: string
}

interface CheckoutError {
  message: string
  code?: string
}

interface CheckoutInstance {
  unmount: () => void
  on: (event: 'ready' | 'success' | 'error' | 'close', handler: (...args: any[]) => void) => void
}
```

---

## Error Handling

All SDK errors extend `PulseError`:

```
PulseError (base)
├── PulseApiError (any API error)
│   ├── PulseAuthenticationError (401)
│   └── PulseRateLimitError (429)
```

### Usage

```typescript
import {
  PulseApiError,
  PulseAuthenticationError,
  PulseRateLimitError,
} from '@infi/pulse-sdk'

try {
  await pulse.paymentLinks.create({ title: 'Test', amount: '10.00' })
} catch (err) {
  if (err instanceof PulseAuthenticationError) {
    // 401 — invalid API key
  } else if (err instanceof PulseRateLimitError) {
    // 429 — retry after err.retryAfter seconds
    console.log(`Retry in ${err.retryAfter}s`)
  } else if (err instanceof PulseApiError) {
    // Other: err.status, err.errorCode, err.message
    console.error(`${err.status}: [${err.errorCode}] ${err.message}`)
  }
}
```

### Error Properties

```typescript
class PulseError extends Error {
  message: string
}

class PulseApiError extends PulseError {
  status: number          // HTTP status code
  errorCode: string       // Machine-readable code (e.g. "unauthorized")
  rateLimit?: RateLimitInfo
}

class PulseAuthenticationError extends PulseApiError {
  // status = 401, errorCode = "unauthorized"
}

class PulseRateLimitError extends PulseApiError {
  // status = 429, errorCode = "rate_limit_exceeded"
  retryAfter: number      // seconds to wait
}
```

---

## Rate Limiting

The API returns rate limit headers on every response:

```typescript
interface RateLimitInfo {
  limit: number      // Max requests per minute (free=100, pro=1000, enterprise=5000)
  remaining: number  // Remaining in current window
  reset: number      // Unix timestamp when window resets
}
```

Available on `PulseApiError.rateLimit` and `PulseRateLimitError.rateLimit`.

---

## API Authentication

API keys use the format `sk_live_{base64url_encoded_bytes}`.
Sent as: `Authorization: Bearer sk_live_...`
Created in the Pulse dashboard under **Developers > API Keys**.

---

## All Exports

```typescript
// Main class
export class Pulse

// Standalone functions
export function verifyWebhookSignature(rawBody, signatureHeader, secret): boolean
export function mountCheckout(selector, options): CheckoutInstance

// Error classes
export class PulseError extends Error
export class PulseApiError extends PulseError
export class PulseAuthenticationError extends PulseApiError
export class PulseRateLimitError extends PulseApiError

// Types
export type PulseConfig
export type CreatePaymentLinkParams
export type PaymentLink
export type ListPaymentLinksParams
export type PaymentIntent
export type ReceivedPayment
export type ListReceivedPaymentsParams
export type CreateWebhookParams
export type Webhook
export type WebhookCreated
export type WebhookPayload
export type RateLimitInfo
export type ApiErrorResponse
export type CheckoutMountOptions
export type CheckoutPayment
export type CheckoutError
export type CheckoutInstance
export type CheckoutTheme
```
